blur_detection.description: The text and edges show moderate blur, which may affect OCR accuracy.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Adjust contrast levels to enhance text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare detected on the document.

water_stains.description: No water stains detected on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears or folds detected on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: Minor cut-off detected at the bottom edge.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is captured in future scans.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections detected on the document.

obstructions.description: No obstructions detected on the document.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, item description, and payment method. It is a detailed invoice for telecommunications services.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 7 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document. The missing field is 'taxInformation', but the presence of other critical fields like transaction amount and payment method solidifies its classification as an expense.

extraction.special_notes: Vous pouvez consulter vos factures et payer directement depuis l'app My Orange.
extraction.terms_conditions: Consultez nos Conditions Générales sur www.orange.be

issues.description: The customer name on the receipt is Mr. PASCAL CAISSE, but the receipt should include the ICP details (GoGlobal Europe GmbH) as per the ICP requirements.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: GoGlobal Europe GmbH company details must be included on the invoice

issues.description: The receipt does not include the business purpose of the expense, which is a mandatory requirement.
issues.recommendation: Please provide a clear documentation of the business purpose for this expense
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Business purpose must be established and clearly documented for all expenses

issues.description: The receipt does not include the employee's line manager approval, which is a mandatory requirement.
issues.recommendation: Please obtain and provide the employee's line manager approval before the payroll cutoff date
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Employee's line manager approval required before payroll cutoff date

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with the customer name not matching the ICP requirements, missing business purpose documentation, and missing line manager approval. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance.
